raw: Each New England Botanic Garden Membership Card entitles the bearer to half-price admission for up to two library patrons. Admission information is available online at https://nebg.org/plan-your-visit/ Make sure you check with the museum if there is inclement weather . HOURS Open daily: 10 a.m.–5 p.m. Last admission: 4:30 p.m. Please note: The Garden will be closed on January 1, November 27, and December 24, 25, & 31 for general daytime admission. For the safety of our guests, the Garden may close due to severe weather. Please check the website, Facebook and Instagram or call 508-869-6111 for updates.
